# CWE-829: Inclusion of Functionality from Untrusted Control Sphere (mitigated, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-829-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
	"path/filepath"
	"plugin"
)

var allowedModules = map[string]struct{}{
	"reports.so": {},
	"metrics.so": {},
}

const moduleRoot = "/opt/app/modules"

// Safe: only allowlisted modules under a fixed directory may be loaded.
func LoadExtension(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	name := r.URL.Query().Get("module")
	if _, ok := allowedModules[name]; !ok {
		http.Error(w, "forbidden", http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	full := filepath.Join(moduleRoot, filepath.Clean(name))
	if !filepath.HasPrefix(full, moduleRoot) {
		http.Error(w, "forbidden", http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	p, err := plugin.Open(full)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "load failed", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	sym, err := p.Lookup("Init")
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "init missing", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]bool{"loaded": sym != nil})
}
